mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_category_preference (user_id, category_id, watch_count, like_count, comment_count, favorite_count, total_watch_time, score) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{watchCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{totalWatchTime}, #{score}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE watch_count = VALUES(watch_count), like_count = VALUES(like_count), comment_count = VALUES(comment_count), favorite_count = VALUES(favorite_count), total_watch_time = VALUES(total_watch_time), score = VALUES(score)
